arts.ttl: Mbappe TRANSFORMS to save Real Madrid career
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe is ready to make a change in a bid to save his stalling Real Madrid career. Instead of dwelling on his problems, though, Mbappe is determined to make the 2-0 midweek loss to Athletic in Bilbao a turning point in his career at Real Madrid, who he joined in the summer on a free transfer from PSG.

Girona, in a creditable eighth position, will seek to reaffirm themselves as one of the teams that once again contend for a European place, especially after the valuable point obtained in Villarreal. ...

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd challenged to sign Samu; Real Madrid join Salah race
arts.sum: Friday's football transfer rumours, with updates on Samu, Mohamed Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Alexander Isak, Kevin De Bruyne & more.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: How To Deal With Kylian Mbappe And Aurelien Tchouameni.
arts.sum: On this Members-only episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Leah Revelle discuss: It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.
Joe Champion has provided a score prediction for all 10 matches taking place in LaLiga on Friday, Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Footage resurfaces of Cristiano Ronaldo's stark warning to Kylian Mbappe amid Real Madrid star's struggles at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: The former PSG star has come under immense criticism since his move to Spain and recently missed consecutive penalties for the side against Liverpool and Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Man United 'suffer major blow' in pursuit of Bayern Munich's Alphonso Davies
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have allegedly 'made significant progress' in their attempts to sign Alphonso Davies to a new contract amid interest from Manchester United and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid, Man United 'set to lock horns for 21-year-old' after major Alphonso Davies setback
arts.sum: Real Madrid plan to battle Manchester United for the signature of Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez next summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid want Arsenal star who is on a “different level” according to Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s interest in Arsenal defender William Saliba has been well documented in the media. Just like they have signed Raphael Varane in the past, they are looking to make the young French defender a part of their setup after being impressed by his consistent performances for the last two seasons. Carlo Ancelotti need more […] The post Real Madrid want Arsenal star who is on a “different level” according to Mikel Arteta appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Man Utd’s January PLAN, Van Dijk LATEST, Endrick’s FUTURE
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has revealed the latest football transfers and news, discussing Ruben Amorim’s focus at Manchester United, Liverpool ’s progress with Virgil van Dijk ’s contract and Real Madrid ’s Endrick plans. Romano says that Man Utd will leave it to the last minute before deciding their strategy in the January transfer window, with new head coach Ruben Amorim more closely focused on assessing the players he already has at his disposal.
